## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] All `SKILL.md` files have valid YAML frontmatter (`---`, `name:`, `description:`)
- [ ] All CSV reference files are parseable
- [ ] New skills follow the Pocketto pattern (Hard Gates, Phase, Handoff)
- [ ] Bilingual sections (EN/ID) present where applicable
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, CHANGELOG, etc.)
